title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
